nasb.text: Then Abimelech remained at Arumah, but Zebul drove out Gaal and his relatives so that they could not remain in Shechem.

esv.text: And Abimelech lived at Arumah, and Zebul drove out Gaal and his relatives, so that they could not dwell at Shechem.

cnv.text: 亞比米勒住在亞魯瑪；西布勒把迦勒和他的兄弟趕走，不許他們住在示劍。

ccb.text: 之后，亚比米勒住在亚鲁玛，西布勒把迦勒和他的弟兄逐出示剑。
